passive.name: Demon Shade
passive.description: When out of combat, Evelynn enters Demon Shade. Demon Shade heals Evelynn when she is low on health and grants Camouflage after level 6.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Innate:}} While [[Combat status|out of combat]], {{ci|Evelynn}} gains ''Demon Shade''.
wiki_detail.blurb4: {{sbc|Demon Shade:}} '''Evelynn''' rapidly {{tip|heals}} while she is {{as|at low health}}. After level 6, ''Demon Shade'' also grants {{tip|camouflage}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Innate:}} '''Evelynn''' shrouds herself in ''Demon Shade'' after not performing actions that {{tip|break stealth}} for 4 seconds. Attacking or casting abilities ends ''Demon Shade'' immediately and places it on a 4-second {{tt|static cooldown|Unaffected by ability haste}}, reduced to {{fd|1.25}} seconds from casting {{ai|Last Caress|Evelynn}}. Taking damage from {{tip|champion|champions}} or {{tip|turret|turrets}} interrupts ''Demon Shade'' and places it on a {{fd|1.5}}-second {{tt|static cooldown|Unaffected by ability haste}}.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Demon Shade:}} While below {{as|{{sti|health|{{pp|250 to 590}} {{as|(+ 250% AP)}} health}}}}, '''Evelynn''' {{tip|heal|heals}} herself for {{pp|15 to 150}} every second. From [[Experience (champion)|level]] 6 onward, ''Demon Shade'' also grants {{tip|camouflage}}.
wiki_detail.notes:
* ''Demon Shade'' is also placed on a {{fd|1.5}} second cooldown upon [[death|respawning]].
* ''Demon Shade's'' cooldown incurs upon starting the attack windup of the basic attack and upon the cast time of the ability.
* ''Demon Shade'' activates even if '''Evelynn''' is {{si|Recall|Recalling}}.
* Whenever ''Demon Shade'' activates, a puff of purple smoke will briefly appear around her.
* Using a basic attack breaks the stealth at the start of the attack windup.

Q.name: Hate Spike
Q.description: Evelynn strikes out with her Lasher, dealing damage to the first unit hit. Then, Evelynn can shoot a line of spikes at nearby foes a few times.
Q.tooltip:
Evelynn strikes with her Lasher, dealing {{ missiledamage }} magic damage to the first enemy hit and causing Evelynn's next 3 Attacks or Abilities on that unit to deal an additional {{ totalbonusdamage }} magic damage. Evelynn can Recast this Ability up to {{ qstackcount }} times.

Recast: Evelynn fires spikes through the nearest enemy, dealing {{ missiledamage }} magic damage to all enemies hit.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Evelynn}} fires her Lasher, dealing {{as|magic damage}} to the first enemy hit and marking them. '''Evelynn's '''next few attacks against the marked target will deal {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}}.
wiki_detail.blurb2: {{sbc|Recast:}} '''Evelynn''' shoots a line of spikes toward the target enemy, dealing {{as|magic damage}} to all enemies hit. She may recast up to 3 times.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Evelynn''' launches a dart in the target direction, dealing {{as|magic damage}} to the first enemy hit and marking them for 4 seconds.
wiki_detail.description2: '''Evelynn's''' next 3 [[basic attack]]s or [[champion ability|abilities]] against the marked target deal {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}}.
wiki_detail.leveling2: {{st|Bonus Magic Damage|{{ap|15 to 55}} {{as|(+ 25% AP)}}|Total Bonus Damage|{{ap|15*3 to 55*3}} {{as|(+ {{ap|25*3}}% AP)}}}}
wiki_detail.description3: ''Hate Spike'' may be recast up to 3 times at no cost until the ability comes off cooldown.
wiki_detail.description4: {{sbc|Recast:}} '''Evelynn''' unleashes a line of deadly spikes in the direction of the nearest {{tip|sight|visible}} enemy that deals {{as|magic damage}} to all enemies struck.
wiki_detail.leveling4: {{st|Magic Damage|{{ap|25 to 45}} {{as|(+ 25% AP)}}|Maximum Magic Damage|{{ap|25*3 to 45*3}} {{as|(+ {{ap|25*3}}% AP)}}|Total Magic Damage|{{ap|25*4+15*3 to 45*4+55*3}} {{as|(+ {{ap|25*4+25*3}}% AP)}}}}
wiki_detail.description5: ''Hate Spike's'' recast prioritizes targeting '''Evelynn's''' attack target, then the nearest enemy champion, then the nearest non-champion.
wiki_detail.description6: ''A nearby {{tip|sight|visible}} enemy is required to recast this ability.''
wiki_detail.customlabel: {{tt|Barrage Cooldown|Cooldown in between each spike cast, affected by ability haste}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* Each cast counts as an ability activation for the purposes of on-cast effects such as {{tip|Spellblade}} and triggering {{ais|Force Pulse|Kassadin}} passive.
* ''Hate Spike'' prioritizes:
*# The last champion '''Evelynn''' hit
*# The last non-champion '''Evelynn''' hit
*# The lowest-health champion
*# The lowest-health non-champion
* The dart applies {{tip|spell damage}} and the spikes deal {{tip|area damage}}.
{{Effect at cast time start}}
* Recasts can be buffered up to {{fd|0.5}} seconds before becoming castable at a maximum range of approximately 500 units.

W.name: Allure
W.description: Evelynn curses her target, causing her next attack or spell after a delay to charm her target and reduce their magic resist.
W.tooltip:
Evelynn marks a champion or monster for 5 seconds. If Evelynn hits the target with an Attack or Ability, she will expunge the mark, refund its cost, and Slow the target by {{ slowamount*100 }}% for {{ slowduration }} seconds.

If the mark lasts at least 2.5 seconds, expunging it has extra effects:Against champions: Charms them for {{ charmduration }} second(s) and removes {{ mrshred*100 }}% Magic Resist for {{ shredduration }} seconds.Against monsters: Charms them for {{ monstercharm }} seconds and deals {{ monsterdamagetotaltooltip }} magic damage.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Evelynn}} ''curses'' the target enemy, causing her next attack against the target to ''expunge'' the ''curse'', {{tip|slow|slowing}} the target and refunding the {{sti|mana|{{as|mana cost}}}}.
wiki_detail.blurb2:
If the ''curse'' matures long enough, the ''expunge'' will increase the slow, {{tip|charm}} the target, and apply an additional effect based on the target type.
* {{tip|Champions}} have {{sti|magic penetration|{{as|reduced magic resist}}}} for a few seconds.
* {{tip|Monsters}} are dealt {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}} and increased {{tip|charm}} duration.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Evelynn''' ''curses'' the target enemy {{tip|champion}} or medium or large {{tip|monster}} for 5 seconds.
wiki_detail.description2: '''Evelynn's''' next basic attack or ability against the ''accursed'' target ''expunges'' them, {{tip|slow|slowing}} them by 45% for {{fd|0.75}} seconds.
wiki_detail.description3: ''Expunging'' a target will refund ''Allure's'' {{as|{{sti|mana|mana cost}}}}. If the target is ''cursed'' for at least {{fd|2.5}} seconds, the ''expunge'' also {{tip|charm|charms}} them for a few seconds and the duration of the {{tip|slow}} is increased to last for this time, as well as applying additional effects based on the target type.
wiki_detail.description4: Against champions, the ''expunge'' also inflicts {{sti|magic penetration|{{as|magic resistance reduction}}}} for 4 seconds.
wiki_detail.description5: Against monsters, the ''expunge'' deals {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}} and increases the duration of the {{tip|charm}} by 2 seconds.
wiki_detail.leveling5:
{{st|Bonus Magic Damage|{{ap|250 to 450}} {{as|(+ 60% AP)}}}}
{{st|Monster Disable Duration|{{ap|1.25+2 to 2.25+2}} seconds}}
wiki_detail.description6: ''Casting Allure does not break {{ai|Demon Shade|Evelynn}} nor its fade into it.''
wiki_detail.notes:
* The mark fully forming signifies the {{fd|2.5}} seconds have elapsed, meaning the {{tip|charm}} will be applied on the triggering attack or ability.
** An enemy champion cursed by ''Allure'' is alarmed of her presence and after the mark has fully formed, an arrow will appear next to them pointing towards '''Evelynn's''' direction. This is visible to both teams.
* The {{stil|magic penetration}} will be applied to the attack or ability that triggers it.
* ''Allure's'' mark application on a target cannot be blocked by {{tip|spell shield}}.
** The expunge will not occur if the ability is blocked by a spell shield. The mark does not trigger and will remain on the target in this case.
* The {{sti|magic penetration|{{as|magic resistance reduction}}}} debuff is applied independently of the {{tip|Charm}} debuff when the matured mark is expunged, meaning a target can still have their magic resistance reduced while they are resisting applications of CC debuffs (e.g. {{cai|Black Shield|Morgana}}).
* If the target becomes {{tip|untargetable}}, {{tip|death|dies}}, or is too far away or no longer in {{tip|sight}} during the cast time, this ability will cancel but still go on {{sti|cooldown}} and pay its cost.{{bug}}
** ''Allure'' will restart its cooldown whenever the mark debuff is removed.{{bug}}

E.name: Whiplash
E.description: Evelynn whips her target with her Lasher, dealing damage. She then gains Move Speed for a short duration.
E.tooltip:
Evelynn whips an enemy, dealing {{ basedamage }} plus {{ percenthealthbasetooltip }} max Health magic damage. Evelynn gains {{ speedamount*100 }}% Move Speed for {{ speedduration }} seconds.

Entering Demon Shade refreshes this Ability's cooldown and empowers it. When this Ability is empowered, Evelynn dashes to the target and deals {{ empowereddamage }} plus {{ percenthealthempoweredtooltip }} max Health magic damage to her target and everyone she passes through instead.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Evelynn}} whips the target enemy, dealing {{as|magic damage}} based on the {{as|target's '''maximum''' health}} and applying {{tip|on-hit}} effects. She then gains {{sti|ms|{{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}}}} for a short time.
wiki_detail.blurb2: Whenever '''Evelynn''' enters ''{{ai|Demon Shade|Evelynn}}'', ''Whiplash's'' cooldown will {{sti|ah|reset}} and the next cast is {{ai|Empowered Whiplash|Evelynn|empowered}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Evelynn''' whips the target enemy with her lashers, dealing {{as|magic damage}} and applying {{tip|on-hit}} effects at 100% effectiveness.
wiki_detail.description2: '''Evelynn''' also gains {{sti|ms|{{as|30% '''bonus''' movement speed}}}} for 2 seconds.
wiki_detail.leveling: {{st|Magic Damage|{{ap|55 to 115}} {{as|(+ 3% {{as|(+ {{fd|1.5}}% per 100 AP)}} of target's '''maximum''' health)}}}}
wiki_detail.description3: Gaining {{ai|Demon Shade|Evelynn}} resets ''Whiplash's'' {{sti|cooldown}} and {{ai|Empowered Whiplash|Evelynn|empowers}} its next cast. The damage based on the target's health ratio for both ''Whiplash'' and its {{ai|Empowered Whiplash|Evelynn|empowered}} cast deals a minimum of 25 and is capped at 450 against {{tip|monsters}}.
wiki_detail.notes:
* ''Whiplash'' can be {{tip|dodged}} and {{tip|blocked}} but may not miss if '''Evelynn''' is {{tip|blind|blinded}}.
{{Unit-targeted cancel conditions}}

R.name: Last Caress
R.description: Evelynn briefly goes untargetable and decimates the area in front of her before warping backwards a long distance.
R.tooltip: Evelynn unleashes her demonic energy, dealing heavy damage, becoming Untargetable and teleporting backwards. She deals {{ damage }} magic damage, increased to {{ critdamage }} against enemies below 30% Health. Upon cast, set Demon Shade to a 1.25 second cooldown.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Evelynn}} briefly goes {{tip|untargetable}} and decimates the area in front of her, dealing {{as|magic damage}} to enemies within, increased against {{as|low-health targets|health}}. She then {{tip|blink|blinks}} backwards over a distance.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Evelynn''' reveals her true form, becoming {{tip|untargetable}} at the start of the cast time and then unleashing her lashers in a cone in the target direction, dealing {{as|magic damage}} to enemies struck within. After {{tt|{{fd|0.5}} seconds|From end of cast time}}, she {{tip|blink|blinks}} 700 units in the opposite direction and becomes targetable again.
wiki_detail.description2: ''Last Caress'' is empowered to deal {{ccs|240% damage|magic}} against enemies below {{as|{{sti|health|30% of their '''maximum''' health}}}}.
wiki_detail.notes:
* ''Last Caress'' can be buffered during {{ai|Empowered Whiplash|Evelynn}}.
* The casting input controls the direction ''Last Caress' '' damage is dealt from, with the movement automatically happening in the reverse direction.
* Enemy {{tip|champion|champions}} below the health threshold are marked for '''Evelynn''', indicating the target will receive ''Last Caress' '' increased damage.
* The screen will direct to '''Evelynn's''' position after she {{tip|blink|blinks}}.
{{ct|cast|spells=true,false,false,false,false}}
